article.title: Anthropic's warning over AI self-improvement has a hidden message — accelerating development requires more compute before companies ever risk losing control of frontier AI models
article.summary: The company that just a few weeks ago told us that its Mythos model was much too powerful to be released is now saying that we might need to hit the pause button.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 對 AI 自我改進的警告隱含深意 — 加速開發需要更多運算能力，才能在公司冒著失去前沿 AI 模型控制權之前
article.summary_zh: 幾週前才表示其 Mythos 模型強大到不能發佈的公司，現在說我們可能需要按下暫停鍵。

article.title: Google just fired a warning shot in the AI subscription price wars
article.summary: Google just made it significantly cheaper to enjoy its budget AI subscription tier.
article.title_zh: Google 在 AI 訂閱價格戰中發出警告信號
article.summary_zh: Google 大幅降低了其預算 AI 訂閱層級的價格。

article.title: IPO Positions us for Acquisitions: Securitize CEO
article.summary: Carlos Domingo, CEO of Securitize, joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss why he believes it's a good time for Securitize to go public, including raising the profile of tokenization and raising capital for acquisitions. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: IPO 為我們開啟收購之門：Securitize CEO
article.summary_zh: Securitize 首席執行官 Carlos Domingo 在「Bloomberg Crypto」上與嘉賓討論為何現在是 Securitize 上市的好時機，包括提升 tokenization 的知名度和為併購籌集資金。

article.title: China drafts $295 billion plan to build national AI data center grid running on 80% homemade silicon — projected 2028 timeline could run into limits of local chip production
article.summary: China is drafting a plan to spend roughly 2 trillion yuan over five years on a nationwide grid of AI data centers.
article.title_zh: 中國草擬 2950 億美元計畫建設國家 AI 資料中心網格，採用 80% 國産晶片——2028 年預計時程可能面臨本地晶片產量限制
article.summary_zh: 中國草擬一項計畫，在五年內投入約 2 兆人民幣用於全國 AI 資料中心網格建設。

article.title: Startup Ricursive to Create an End-to-End AI Model for Chip Design
article.summary: Palo Alto, Calif. — Startup Ricursive, founded by the two leads from Google’s famous AlphaChip project, is aiming to develop an end-to-end AI model for chip design. The new AI frontier lab is focused on
article.title_zh: 新創公司 Ricursive 開發晶片設計端對端 AI 模型
article.summary_zh: 位於加州帕羅奧圖的新創公司 Ricursive 由 Google 著名的 AlphaChip 專案的兩位主管創辦，旨在開發晶片設計的端對端 AI 模型。

article.title: Jedify raises $24M to help companies arm AI agents with context on their business
article.summary: The funding round was led by Norwest, with participation from S Capital VC, Cerca Partners, and Oceans Ventures. Snowflake Ventures also participated as a strategic investor.
article.title_zh: Jedify籌集2,400萬美元幫助公司為AI代理配備業務背景知識
article.summary_zh: 此輪融資由Norwest領投，S Capital VC、Cerca Partners和Oceans Ventures參與，Snowflake Ventures也作為戰略投資者參與。

article.title: Claude Fable 5 brings Mythos to the masses — Anthropic's new frontier model is 'state-of-the-art on nearly all tested benchmarks'
article.summary: After first announcing its scarily capable Mythos Preview model back in April, Anthropic is releasing a public version of Mythos, called Fable 5, that it says is "safe for general use."
article.title_zh: Claude Fable 5 將 Mythos 帶向大眾 — Anthropic 的新前沿模型在「幾乎所有測試基準上達到最先進水準」
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 在四月首次公佈其功能強大的 Mythos Preview 模型後，現已推出公開版本 Fable 5，宣稱其「安全供一般使用」。

article.title: Google makes its AI Plus plan cheaper, doubles the cloud storage that comes with it
article.summary: Google scored a big victory yesterday as its Gemini model became the foundation of Apple’s new Siri. But the tech giant is pushing even harder to grab as much market share during the AI boom as possible – it just made its base AI plan cheaper. Google AI Plus used to be $8 a month and came with 200GB of storage. The monthly price has been reduced to $5 or the local equivalent, wrote Vikas Kansal on his X account (Kansal is the Product lead for Google AI subscriptions). We clicked around the various local sites and here are some of the prices in local currencies: USD 5 / CAD 7 / GBP...
article.title_zh: Google 降低 AI Plus 計畫價格，並將其雲端儲存容量加倍
article.summary_zh: Google 推出更便宜的基礎 AI 計畫以搶佔市場份額。Google AI Plus 從 $8/月降價，並提供更多雲端儲存容量。

article.title: Anthropic Claude Fable 5 on AWS: Mythos-class capabilities with built-in safeguards now available
article.summary: Today, we’re announcing the availability of Claude Fable 5 on Amazon Bedrock and Claude Platform on AWS . Claude Fable 5 makes Mythos-level capabilities available to customers, with strong safeguards designed to make it safe for broader use. Fable 5 is state-of-the-art on nearly all tested benchmarks and delivers exceptional performance in software engineering, knowledge work tasks, and vision – built for ambitious, long running work. With Claude Fable 5 on Bedrock, you can build within your existing AWS environment and scale inference workloads. You can also use Claude Fable 5 through the Claude Platform on AWS, giving you Anthropic’s native platform experience. According to Anthropic, Claude Fable 5 represents a step-change in what you can accomplish with AI models. Here is what makes th
article.title_zh: Anthropic Claude Fable 5 在 AWS 上推出：具有內置安全保障的 Mythos 級功能現已推出
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 宣布 Claude Fable 5 在 Amazon Bedrock 和 AWS Claude Platform 上推出，為客戶提供 Mythos 級功能，並配備強大的安全保障措施。Fable 5 在幾乎所有測試基準上都達到了最先進的水平。

article.title: YouTube Music redesign moves Search to bottom bar on Android, iOS [U]
article.summary: Following the Now Playing redesign in April, the next big YouTube Music change moves Search to the bottom bar. more…
article.title_zh: YouTube Music 重新設計將搜尋功能移至 Android、iOS 底部欄 [更新]
article.summary_zh: 繼 4 月 Now Playing 重新設計後，YouTube Music 的下一步重大變更是將搜尋功能移至底部欄。

article.title: Anthropic just released public Mythos-class AI model called Claude Fable, details here
article.summary: Back in April, Anthropic unveiled its Claude Mythos AI model that it said was too powerful to publicly release. Instead, the company has shared access with software vendors, including Apple, in an effort to use the model for enhanced cybersecurity. Now, as promised, Anthropic has released what it calls a Mythos-class model that customers can actually use. The new model is called Claude Fable. more…
article.title_zh: Anthropic 發布公開 Mythos 級 AI 模型 Claude Fable，詳情如下
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 現已如承諾般發布了 Claude Mythos AI 模型的公開版本，用於增強網路安全。

article.title: Claude Fable 5 available today in Microsoft Foundry: Powering the next era of autonomous agents
article.summary: Claude Fable 5 , Anthropic’s latest frontier model, is available today in Microsoft Foundry , powering agents in GitHub Copilot and Foundry Agent Service . Claude Fable 5 makes Mythos-level capabilities available to all customers, with strong safeguards designed to make it safe for general use. See what’s new in Claude Fable 5 Fable 5 is designed for long-running, multi-stage, and asynchronous tasks like complex code refactoring, deep research synthesis, and document-heavy workflows. This elevated level of autonomy changes what teams can ask AI to do. Enterprises can now delegate sophisticated multi-turn projects to agents, enabling them to reason over your organization’s data to solve real problems. For enterprises, this frontier capability is only part of the equation. To tur
article.title_zh: Claude Fable 5 現已在 Microsoft Foundry 推出：驅動下一代自主智能體
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 最新的前沿模型 Claude Fable 5 現已在 Microsoft Foundry 推出，為 GitHub Copilot 和 Foundry Agent Service 中的智能體提供支持。Fable 5 為所有客戶提供 Mythos 級功能，並配備強大的安全保障措施。

article.title: Databricks wants to kill the “email me a file” problem for AI agent skills
article.summary: Databricks on Wednesday launched OpenSharing, the successor to its open-source Delta Sharing protocol. This updated protocol adds support for Apache Iceberg REST Catalog clients and brings on-premises storage vendors into the ecosystem, starting with Everpure (previously Pure Storage), MinIO , and Qumulo . Also, OpenSharing is now a standalone Linux Foundation project and extends Delta Sharing’s zero-copy sharing beyond tables to include agent skills, AI models, and unstructured data. Most layers of the agent stack have settled on a standard by now: MCP connects agents to tools Google’s Agent2Agent protocol, which has been a Linux Foundation project since June 2025 , lets them communicate Anthropic’s open Agent Skills spec defines a skill OpenSharing builds on this stack
article.title_zh: Databricks 希望為 AI 代理技能解決「透過電郵傳送檔案」問題
article.summary_zh: Databricks 週三推出了 OpenSharing，作為其開源 Delta Sharing 協議的後續版本。此更新協議新增了對 Apache Iceberg REST Catalog 客戶端的支援，並將本地儲存廠商引入生態系統。
